steps.title: Read two points on the line of best fit
steps.content: From the scatterplot, the line of best fit crosses the $y$-axis near $(0, 13)$ and passes near the lower-right corner of the data at approximately $(10, 5)$.

steps.title: Compute the slope between those points
Match to a choice
steps.content: The computed slope $-0.8$ matches choice B exactly, and the negative sign agrees with the visible downward trend of the data. That matches choice B — B is correct.
